description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has two jobs: one for building and testing on Ubuntu, and another for building and testing on various Unix flavors. The Ubuntu job checks out the code, updates packages, installs dependencies, and runs tests. The Unix flavors job uses a matrix strategy to run on different operating systems, waits for the Ubuntu job to complete, checks out the code, launches a Docker container, updates packages, installs dependencies, and runs tests.
